prompt: A cinematic commercial product photo of a glossy red snack bag standing upright on a wet city street at night, centered in frame, shot straight-on at eye level with shallow depth of field and dramatic orange neon lighting. The package is covered in realistic water droplets and reflects warm streetlights. The brand name on the bag reads {argument name="brand name" default="CRUNCHY CHIPZ"} in very large bold white bubble letters with a thick dark outline, stacked across two lines in the center. Behind the logo is a jagged yellow-orange comic-style starburst graphic. In the lower right area of the bag, smaller printed flavor text reads {argument name="flavor text" default="ZESTY CHEDDAR"}, with tiny subtext below reading "FLAVORED CORN SNACKS." Near the bottom left edge of the bag, tiny text reads "SAVORY TRIANGLES." Show exactly 3 triangular corn chips total: 2 printed on the front of the bag and 1 real chip placed on the wet pavement in front of the package, leaning slightly back. The chips are orange, heavily seasoned, and textured. The background is a moody urban alley with blurred neon signs and round bokeh lights, all in deep amber, orange, and red tones, with glossy reflections on the rain-soaked ground. Ultra-detailed advertising photography, high contrast, sharp focus on the bag and front chip, premium snack packaging mockup, realistic condensation, rich saturated colors, studio-quality product retouching blended with a rainy street lifestyle setting.
translatedPrompt: 一张电影质感的商业产品照片，展示一个光亮的红色零食包装袋直立在潮湿的夜间城市街道上。画面居中，采用平视视角拍摄，具有浅景深效果和戏剧性的橙色霓虹灯光。包装袋上的品牌名称显示为 {argument name="brand name" default="CRUNCHY CHIPZ"}，采用超大号粗体白色气泡字体，带有厚实的深色轮廓，分两行堆叠在中心位置。Logo 后方是一个锯齿状的黄橙色漫画风格星爆图形。在包装袋右下角区域，印有较小的口味文字 {argument name="flavor text" default="ZESTY CHEDDAR"}，下方附有微小的副标题 "FLAVORED CORN SNACKS"。在包装袋左下边缘附近，印有微小文字 "SAVORY TRIANGLES"。画面中总共展示 3 片三角形玉米片：2 片印在包装袋正面，1 片真实的玉米片放置在包装袋前方的潮湿路面上，略微向后倾斜。玉米片呈橙色，调料丰富，质感逼真。背景是充满情绪感的城市小巷，带有模糊的霓虹灯牌和圆形光斑，整体呈现深琥珀色、橙色和红色调，雨水浸湿的地面上有光亮的倒影。超精细广告摄影，高对比度，焦点清晰地聚焦在包装袋和前方的玉米片上，高端零食包装样机，逼真的冷凝水珠，色彩浓郁饱和，摄影棚级产品修图与雨天街道生活场景完美融合。

breakdown.creativeCore: Neon Rain 零食包装广告：此提示词可生成一张极具戏剧性的商业产品照，展示在霓虹闪烁的雨夜街道背景下，带有品牌标识的芝士玉米片包装袋，非常适合包装样机和零食广告使用。
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, premium, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: neon, high contrast, shallow depth, depth of field]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
